zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Andrews III於1316年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Ralph Andrews II32歲，母親Lady, Joan Whitney25歲。他於1341年與Lady, Anne Swinborne在英國諾薩普頓史爾吉爾斯比結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1360年在英國萊希斯特斯爾享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Andrews III于1316年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Ralph Andrews II32岁，母亲Lady, Joan Whitney25岁。他于1341年与Lady, Anne Swinborne在英国諾薩普頓史爾吉爾斯比结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1360年在英国萊希斯特斯爾享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Andrews
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Andrew , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This is the usual southern English patronymic form, also found in Wales; the Scottish and northern English form is Anderson . In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. Polish Andrzejewski , Slovenian Andrejčič, Serbian and Croatian Andrić (see Andric ), and Czech Ondráček (see Ondracek ).
Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Mac Aindreis or Irish Mac Aindriú, see McAndrew .

History: This was a common name among the early settlers in New England. Robert Andrews emigrated in 1635 from Norwich, England, to Ipswich, MA. Even before 1635, one Thomas Andrews is recorded as being established in Hingham. A certain William Andrews was a member of John Davenport's company, which sailed from Boston in 1638 to found the New Haven colony.

variants.name: Andrus
meanings: History: William Andrus came to Boston in 1635 and moved to New Haven in 1639, where he died in 1676.

variants.name: Andrew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the usual vernacular English form (recorded from the 13th century onward) of the New Testament Greek personal name Andreas . In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech Ondřej (see Ondrey ) and Albanian Ndreu , and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see examples at Andrews ).
History: The surname Andrew was first brought to North America from England by Robert Andrew (died 1668), who settled in Boxford, MA.

variants.name: Andros
meanings: English: variant of   Andrews  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

American shortened form of Greek Andronikos (see Andron 2) or of any other surname based on a personal name beginning with Andr- (from andros, genitive of anēr ‘man, male’), e.g. Androutsos, including their patronymics and other derivatives, such as Andronikidis.

History: William Andros came to VA in 1617 and died there c. 1655. Sir Edmund Andros (1637–1714) was the British colonial governor of several provinces in America between 1674 and 1698, most notably NY (1674–81).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Andrews III was born in 1316, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Ralph Andrews II, was 32 and his mother, Lady, Joan Whitney, was 25. He married Lady, Anne Swinborne in 1341, in Kilsby, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1360, in Leicestershire, England, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Andrews III est né en 1316, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Andrews II, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady, Joan Whitney, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lady, Anne Swinborne en 1341, à Kilsby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1360, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Andrews III 1316 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Andrews II 32 und seine Mutter Lady, Joan Whitney 25. Er hat 1341 in Kilsby, Northamptonshire, England Lady, Anne Swinborne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1360 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Leicestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Andrews III è nato il nel 1316 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph Andrews II, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Lady, Joan Whitney, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Lady, Anne Swinborne nel 1341, nel Kilsby, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1360, nel Leicestershire, England, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Andrews IIIが1316年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ralph Andrews IIは32歳，母Lady, Joan Whitneyは25歳であった。1341年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアキルスビーでLady, Anne Swinborneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1360年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Andrews III(이)가 1316년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Andrews II(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady, Joan Whitney(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1341년 영국 노르섬프토실르 킬스비에서 Lady, Anne Swinborne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1360년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Andrews III nasceu em 1316, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Andrews II, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lady, Joan Whitney, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady, Anne Swinborne em 1341, em Kilsby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1360, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Andrews III родился в 1316 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Andrews II было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady, Joan Whitney, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady, Anne Swinborne в 1341 г. в местности килсби, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1360 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Andrews III nació en 1316, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Andrews II, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lady, Joan Whitney, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Lady, Anne Swinborne en 1341, en Kilsby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1360, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años.
